group.description: Eclipse RCP-specific concepts: classifies bundles as framework or application bundles, extracts platform filter (OS/architecture) and localization properties, parses plugin.xml extension points and extensions.

concept.description: Extracts the Eclipse-PlatformFilter manifest header and sets platformFilter, targetOs, and targetArch properties on the bundle. Labels such bundles as :Eclipse:PlatformSpecific.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Eclipse-PlatformFilter"}) WITH bundle, trim(entry.value) AS filter SET bundle:Eclipse:PlatformSpecific, bundle.platformFilter = filter WITH bundle, filter // Extract osgi.os value WITH bundle, filter, CASE WHEN filter CONTAINS "osgi.os=" THEN split(split(filter, "osgi.os=")[1], ")")[0] ELSE null END AS os, CASE WHEN filter CONTAINS "osgi.arch=" THEN split(split(filter, "osgi.arch=")[1], ")")[0] ELSE null END AS arch SET bundle.targetOs = os, bundle.targetArch = arch RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, filter AS PlatformFilter, os AS OS, arch AS Arch

concept.description: Extracts the Bundle-Localization manifest header (typically "plugin") used for Eclipse i18n.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(mf:Manifest:File) -[:DECLARES]->(ms:ManifestSection {name: "Main"}) -[:HAS]->(entry:ManifestEntry {name: "Bundle-Localization"}) SET bundle.bundleLocalization = trim(entry.value) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, bundle.bundleLocalization AS Localization

concept.description: Labels bundles with symbolic names starting with "org.eclipse." as :Eclipse:FrameworkBundle to distinguish Eclipse platform bundles from application bundles.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE bundle.bundleSymbolicName STARTS WITH "org.eclipse." SET bundle:Eclipse:FrameworkBundle RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS EclipseBundle

concept.description: Labels OSGi bundles that are NOT Eclipse framework bundles as :Eclipse:ApplicationBundle, helping to distinguish custom application code from platform dependencies.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle) WHERE NOT bundle:Eclipse:FrameworkBundle SET bundle:Eclipse:ApplicationBundle RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS ApplicationBundle

concept.description: Labels XML elements named "extension-point" inside a bundle's plugin.xml as :Eclipse:ExtensionPoint and creates DEFINES_EXTENSION_POINT relationships from the bundle. Extracts id, name, and schema attributes onto the node.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(doc:Xml:Document) WHERE doc.fileName ENDS WITH '/plugin.xml' MATCH (doc)-[:HAS_ROOT_ELEMENT]->(root:Xml:Element {name: 'plugin'}) MATCH (root)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(ep:Xml:Element {name: 'extension-point'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ep)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(idAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'id'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ep)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(nameAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'name'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ep)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(schemaAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'schema'}) SET ep:Eclipse:ExtensionPoint, ep.extensionPointId = idAttr.value, ep.extensionPointName = nameAttr.value, ep.schema = schemaAttr.value MERGE (bundle)-[:DEFINES_EXTENSION_POINT]->(ep) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, ep.extensionPointId AS Id, ep.extensionPointName AS Name, ep.schema AS Schema ORDER BY Bundle, Id

concept.description: Labels XML elements named "extension" inside a bundle's plugin.xml as :Eclipse:Extension and creates DECLARES_EXTENSION relationships from the bundle. Extracts point (referenced extension point id), id, and name attributes onto the node.
concept.cypher: MATCH (bundle:Osgi:Bundle)-[:CONTAINS]->(doc:Xml:Document) WHERE doc.fileName ENDS WITH '/plugin.xml' MATCH (doc)-[:HAS_ROOT_ELEMENT]->(root:Xml:Element {name: 'plugin'}) MATCH (root)-[:HAS_ELEMENT]->(ext:Xml:Element {name: 'extension'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ext)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(pointAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'point'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ext)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(idAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'id'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (ext)-[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(nameAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'name'}) SET ext:Eclipse:Extension, ext.point = pointAttr.value, ext.extensionId = idAttr.value, ext.extensionName = nameAttr.value MERGE (bundle)-[:DECLARES_EXTENSION]->(ext) RETURN bundle.bundleSymbolicName AS Bundle, ext.point AS Point, ext.extensionId AS Id, ext.extensionName AS Name ORDER BY Bundle, Point, Id

concept.description: For each :Eclipse:Extension, scans descendant elements for a "class" attribute and creates IMPLEMENTED_BY relationships to the matching :Type node (when present in the graph). Common usage: extension contributions like <view class="com.example.MyView"/>.
concept.cypher: MATCH (ext:Eclipse:Extension)-[:HAS_ELEMENT*1..5]->(child:Xml:Element) -[:HAS_ATTRIBUTE]->(classAttr:Xml:Attribute {name: 'class'}) WITH ext, classAttr.value AS className WHERE className IS NOT NULL AND className =~ '^[a-zA-Z_$][a-zA-Z0-9_$.]*$' MATCH (type:Type) WHERE type.fqn = className MERGE (ext)-[:IMPLEMENTED_BY]->(type) RETURN DISTINCT ext.point AS Point, ext.extensionId AS ExtensionId, type.fqn AS Implementation ORDER BY Point, ExtensionId, Implementation
